mapper.select: SELECT id, title, content, tags_json, summary, view_count, created_at, updated_at FROM articles WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, title, content, tags_json, summary, view_count, created_at, updated_at FROM articles ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT id, title, content, tags_json, summary, view_count, created_at, updated_at FROM articles WHERE tags_json LIKE CONCAT('%', #{tag}, '%') ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM articles WHERE tags_json LIKE CONCAT('%', #{tag}, '%')
SELECT id, title, content, tags_json, summary, view_count, created_at, updated_at FROM articles ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE articles SET view_count = #{viewCount} WHERE id = #{id}
